properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Many times she called out to You Son of David, hear my plea Unworthy of the children's bread You still met her need And like her, I'm unworthy but I've heard you call me child So by faith I will wait on You, and know that all the while

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You always answer me, right in my hour of need Not always how I think You should, But always for my good You always answer me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It seemed the heavens were unopened When I called upon Your name Even so, come quickly Lord In earnest hope, I pray for But my lowly expectations, Your plans they were no match Though broken when you finally came You gave more than I asked

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And how I know You will is that You've always been true To Your word, You've always heard and led this willing one So be it unto me, according to Thy word According to Thy way, Thy will be done

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Not always how I think You should Not always what I want, but right when I need it You're an on time God, and I'm thankful for it
